name: chatgpt-sidecar
description: Open a real ChatGPT Quick Chat with the active Codex conversation and repository context, without submitting another Codex turn.

interface.shortDescription: Open ChatGPT Quick Chat with active Codex context
interface.longDescription: Sidecar installs a Windows global-hotkey listener that reads the active saved Codex conversation and repository locally, opens the ChatGPT app's real Quick Chat through Windows Accessibility, pastes the prepared context, and submits it without sending a message to the Codex thread.
defaultPrompt: Install the one-hotkey Sidecar Quick Chat workflow.
Use Ctrl+Alt+S to send active Codex context to ChatGPT.
Open a ChatGPT Quick Chat without another Codex turn.
